ipteunyeong.title: Collecting Fridge Magnets
ipteunyeong.text: I have a unique hobby that might seem childish to some people - collecting fridge magnets. It all started during my first business trip to Japan five years ago. I bought a small Tokyo Tower magnet as a souvenir, and it looked so lonely on my empty refrigerator that I decided to find it some company. Now, my fridge is covered with magnets from over thirty different places. Each magnet tells a story of where I've been or where my friends have traveled. When colleagues visit my apartment, they're always surprised by my colorful collection. Some magnets are from famous landmarks like the Eiffel Tower or Big Ben, while others are quirky local finds from small towns. My favorite is a handmade ceramic magnet from a pottery shop in Busan that my mother bought for me. Collecting fridge magnets has become more than just a hobby - it's a way to preserve memories and share travel experiences with visitors. Every time I open my refrigerator, I'm reminded of wonderful places and the people who thought of me during their journeys.
ipteunyeong.korean_summary: 5년 전 첫 출장에서 시작된 냉장고 자석 수집 취미에 관한 이야기입니다. 현재 30개 이상의 나라와 도시 자석을 수집하고 있으며, 각각이 여행의 추억과 이야기를 담고 있습니다. 단순한 취미를 넘어 추억을 보존하고 사람들과 여행 경험을 나누는 방법이 되었습니다.

gwitunyeong.title: Global Stock Rally Faces Growing Risk of a Market Correction
gwitunyeong.text: Global stock markets are showing signs of vulnerability after months of unprecedented gains, with analysts warning of an impending correction. The S&P 500 and other major indices have reached record highs, driven by artificial intelligence hype and hopes of economic resilience. However, several warning signals are emerging. Market valuations have stretched to concerning levels, with price-to-earnings ratios hitting multi-year peaks. Additionally, trading volumes have declined significantly, suggesting waning investor enthusiasm. Geopolitical tensions and persistent inflation concerns are adding to market uncertainty. Financial experts are particularly worried about the concentration of gains in a handful of technology stocks, creating an unstable foundation for continued growth. Meanwhile, rising bond yields are making fixed-income investments more attractive compared to stocks. Market strategists recommend investors exercise caution and consider taking some profits off the table. While no one can predict the exact timing of a correction, many believe the current rally is unsustainable in its present form.
gwitunyeong.korean_summary: 글로벌 증시가 수개월간의 급등 이후 조정 위험에 직면하고 있습니다. 높은 밸류에이션, 거래량 감소, 지정학적 긴장 등이 우려 요인으로 지적되고 있습니다. 전문가들은 투자자들에게 신중한 접근을 권고하고 있습니다.

key_expressions.example: Each photo on my desk tells a story of my career journey.
I keep a travel journal to preserve memories of my business trips.
This project is more than just a job - it's my passion.
This meeting room reminds me of my first presentation here.
The company reported unprecedented gains in the fourth quarter.
The CEO ignored the warning signals about declining sales.
Investors should exercise caution when entering emerging markets.
Many fund managers decided to take profits off the table before the earnings report.

today_sentences.english: We need to exercise caution when expanding into new markets this quarter.
today_sentences.korean: 이번 분기에 신규 시장으로 확장할 때 신중함을 기해야 합니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: need to + 동사원형으로 필요성 표현, when + 현재분사 시간표현

today_sentences.english: Each project milestone tells a story of our team's dedication and hard work.
today_sentences.korean: 각각의 프로젝트 이정표는 우리 팀의 헌신과 노력의 이야기를 보여줍니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: Each + 단수명사, tell a story of + 명사구 표현

today_sentences.english: This photo collection is more than just decoration - it preserves all my travel memories.
today_sentences.korean: 이 사진 컬렉션은 단순한 장식이 아니라 내 모든 여행 추억을 보존하는 것입니다.
today_sentences.grammar_point: more than just + 명사, 대시(-)를 이용한 부연설명

quiz.korean: 각각의 기념품은 특별한 여행의 추억을 담고 있습니다.
quiz.answer: Each souvenir tells a story of a special travel memory.

quiz.korean: 투자자들은 시장이 불안정할 때 신중함을 기해야 합니다.
quiz.answer: Investors should exercise caution when the market is unstable.

quiz.korean: 이 프로젝트는 단순한 업무 이상의 의미가 있습니다.
quiz.answer: This project is more than just work.

quiz.sentence: The company reported _______ gains in revenue this quarter.
quiz.korean: 회사는 이번 분기에 전례없는 수익 증가를 보고했습니다.

quiz.sentence: Many investors decided to take _______ off the table before the market correction.
quiz.korean: 많은 투자자들이 시장 조정 전에 수익을 실현하기로 결정했습니다.

quiz.sentence: This old music box _______ me of my childhood in Korea.
quiz.korean: 이 오래된 오르골은 한국에서의 어린 시절을 떠올리게 합니다.
